---
name: clarp
description: Start a CLARP editor rep
argument-hint: "[topic problem]"
agent: 'Interviewer'
---

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen_agent_instructions.py -->

- No args: run `just practice-start clarp`.
- Args: run `just catalog "<arguments>"`.
- `READY`, `START: topic/problem`: run `just practice-start clarp topic problem`.
- `QUEUE`: finish current, then take next.
- `CHOOSE`: relay choices; wait.
- `NOT_FOUND`: relay `SUGGEST`; wait.
- Switching: run `just practice-finish "<one concrete fix>"`.

Never edit candidate files; no tree-search. Relay `OPENED` or `OPEN_FAILED`,
then `STATE:`, `SOURCE:`, `TEST:`, and `NEXT:`; stop.
Comments/docstrings have no required schema.
